mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_flowhandletype where ((code in ('1','2','3') and type =1) or (code in ('1','2','3','4') and type=2)) and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.delete: delete from cmp_flowhandletype where ((code in ('1','2','3') and type =1) or (code in ('1','2','3','4') and type=2)) and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into cmp_flowhandletype(id,code,name,sort_num,dr,enablestatus,isend,type,rightcardtype,extend,pubts,tenant_id,ytenant_id) values (#{id101},'1','收付单据匹配关联',1,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id102},'2','收付单据生单',2,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id103},'3','业务凭据匹配关联',3,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id201},'1','收付单据匹配关联',1,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id202},'2','业务凭据匹配关联',2,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id203},'3','收付单据辨识生单',3,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id204},'4','发布认领处理',4,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId});
mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_flowhandletype where code in ('1','2','3','4') and type=2 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
select count(1) from cmp_flowhandletype where code in ('1','2','3') and type =1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.delete: delete from cmp_flowhandletype where code in ('1','2','3','4') and type=2 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
delete from cmp_flowhandletype where code in ('1','2','3') and type =1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into cmp_flowhandletype(id,code,name,sort_num,dr,enablestatus,isend,type,rightcardtype,extend,pubts,tenant_id,ytenant_id) values (#{id201},'1','收付单据匹配关联',1,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id202},'2','业务凭据匹配关联',2,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id203},'3','收付单据辨识生单',3,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id204},'4','发布认领处理',4,0,1,1,2,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_flowhandlesettingist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId});

insert into cmp_flowhandletype(id,code,name,sort_num,dr,enablestatus,isend,type,rightcardtype,extend,pubts,tenant_id,ytenant_id) values (#{id101},'1','收付单据匹配关联',1,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id102},'2','收付单据生单',2,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId}), (#{id103},'3','业务凭据匹配关联',3,0,1,1,1,2,'{\"billnum\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"serviceCode\": \"cmp_fcdsusesettinglist\", \"billtype\": \"ArchiveList\"}',#{pubts},#{tenantId},#{ytenantId});
